title: Backup freshness indicator in the PWA
userStory: As an operator, I want a visible 'last successful backup' indicator so that a silent failure becomes loud within 36h.
acceptanceCriteria: PWA reads the mtime of the backup sentinel file written by US-001 (mounted into the pwa container as a read-only volume)
A small indicator is rendered in a corner of the chat or browse view: 'last backup: <relative time>'
Indicator turns red / warning if the mtime is older than 36h
Verify: simulate a stalled backup (do not touch the sentinel for 36h+); the indicator shows red; restore the sentinel; indicator returns to normal
